narrative:
Precinct Steubenville 2-1 (precinct in Jefferson County) has 831 registered voters, with 63.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 17.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 19.7%, a modest Democratic lean of 2.6 percentage points.
